# mtncloud_workflow (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud workflow (task-set): an ordered set of tasks run together, either operational (`type = operation`) or provisioning (`type = provision`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Operational workflow: runs the referenced tasks on demand.
resource "mtncloud_workflow" "maintenance" {
  name = "nightly-maintenance"
  type = "operation"

  task {
    task_id = mtncloud_task.deploy.id
    phase   = "operation"
  }
  task {
    task_id = mtncloud_task.notify.id
    phase   = "operation"
  }
}

# Provisioning workflow: tasks run at specific provisioning phases.
resource "mtncloud_workflow" "provision" {
  name     = "web-provision"
  type     = "provision"
  platform = "linux"

  task {
    task_id = mtncloud_task.configure.id
    phase   = "postProvision"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the workflow.
- `type` (String) Workflow type: `operation`, `provision`. Changing it forces a new workflow.

### Optional

- `allow_custom_config` (Boolean) Whether custom config may be passed at execution.
- `description` (String) Description of the workflow.
- `labels` (List of String) Labels applied to the workflow. Merged with the provider's default_labels into `labels_all`.
- `platform` (String) Platform filter: `all`, `linux`, `macos`, `windows`.
- `task` (Block List) Ordered member tasks. Order is preserved as the execution order. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--task))
- `visibility` (String) Workflow visibility: `private` or `public`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the workflow.
- `labels_all` (List of String) Effective labels: the provider's default_labels merged (union) with `labels`.

<a id="nestedblock--task"></a>
### Nested Schema for `task`

Required:

- `phase` (String) Phase the task runs in. For `operation` workflows this is `operation`; for `provision` workflows one of: `configure`, `preProvision`, `provision`, `postProvision`, `start`, `stop`, `preDeploy`, `deploy`, `reconfigure`, `teardown`, `shutdown`, `startup`.
- `task_id` (Number) ID of the task to include.
